debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable V
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => G ω ⊔ H ω) P

proof:
by
    have hf : Measurable (fun p : SimpleGraph V × SimpleGraph V ↦ p.1 ⊔ p.2) :=
      measurable_iff_adj.2 fun u v ↦ by
        simp only [sup_adj]
        have hA : Measurable (fun G : SimpleGraph V ↦ G.Adj u v) :=
          measurable_pi_iff.1 (measurable_pi_iff.1 measurable_adj u) v
        exact (hA.comp measurable_fst).or (hA.comp measurable_snd)
    exact hf.comp_aemeasurable (hG.aemeasurable.prodMk hY.aemeasurable)
successful_attempts:
by
    have hf : Measurable (fun p : SimpleGraph V × SimpleGraph V ↦ p.1 ⊔ p.2) :=
      measurable_iff_adj.2 fun u v ↦ by
        simp only [sup_adj]
        have hA : Measurable (fun G : SimpleGraph V ↦ G.Adj u v) :=
          measurable_pi_iff.1 (measurable_pi_iff.1 measurable_adj u) v
        exact (hA.comp measurable_fst).or (hA.comp measurable_snd)
    exact hf.comp_aemeasurable (hG.aemeasurable.prodMk hY.aemeasurable)
